title: Where the Power Comes From
description: The in-world reason a mere human can run a monster's stat block — the augmentation, device, pact, or study that grants monstrous abilities. Often the villain's one exploitable weakness.
entries: forbidden augmentations grafted beneath the skin
a pact with something that answers to no god
relics salvaged from a lost, far smarter civilization
alchemical infusions taken daily — and fatal to stop
a shard of a dead god lodged in the chest
runes carved into their own bones, one per power
a parasite that trades strength for slow possession
clockwork and blackpowder hidden under fine clothes
a lifetime studying the very monster they now imitate
blood transfused, drop by drop, from the beast they ape
a cursed heirloom they can no longer take off
sheer will, and a laboratory no one is allowed to see
